fields.title: skill-manage: wire into app.ts
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 5. Add SkillManagerLayer to createMainLayer, add SkillManager to TauRuntime type, create runSkillManager runner, call initSkillManage in Effect.sync block.
fields.notes: Implemented in extensions/tau/src/app.ts: added SkillManager imports/runtime type, callback holder + SkillManagerLayer wiring, runSkillManager runner, initSkillManage registration, and reloadSkills callback binding via skillMarker. Verification: cd extensions/tau && npx tsc --noEmit passed; cd extensions/tau && npm run gate passed (lint 0 warnings/0 errors, tests 146/146). Close attempt was blocked because dependencies tau-adf and tau-c9z are still open.
